sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: All 6 green blocks have been converted to sky blue. Looking at the image, the green blocks are now all sky blue. The level is still NOT_FINISHED though. Let me check if there are any remaining green blocks or if there's something else I need to do.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check remaining green blocks and other colors
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

colors = set(n['color'] for n in nodes)
print(f"All colors: {colors}")

green = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'N']
print(f"Green nodes: {len(green)}")

# Check for any other interactive objects
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] not in ['p', 'W', 'B', 'G', 'S', 'b', 'Y']:
        print(f"Other: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check player and target
player = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'b']
target = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'Y']
print(f"Player nodes: {len(player)}")
print(f"Target nodes: {len(target)}")

# Maybe I need to move the player to a specific position
# Let me check the sky blue region structure
sky_blue = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'S']
print(f"\nSky blue nodes: {len(sky_blue)}")
for n in sky_blue:
    b = n['boundary']
    min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
    max_r = max(p[0] for p in b)
    min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
    max_c = max(p[1] for p in b)
    print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}, rows={min_r}-{max_r}, cols={min_c}-{max_c}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.content:

Green nodes: 0
Player nodes: 1

Sky blue nodes: 1
  pixels=1097, rows=0-39, cols=13-53

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
All green blocks have been converted to sky blue. Now there's only 1 sky blue node with 1097 pixels, spanning rows 0-39 and cols 13-53. This means all the green blocks have merged with the existing sky blue region.
The level is still NOT_FINISHED. Let me think about what else needs to be done.
The player is a blue cross at the left edge of a cavity. The target is a yellow pixel nearby. Maybe I need to move the player to the target, or maybe I need to do something else.
Wait, looking at the image, the player (blue cross) and target (yellow) are still visible. Maybe the goal is to move the player to a specific position, like the right side of the cavity, or to interact with the target.
Let me try moving the player to the right side and see if that completes the level.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Move player to the right side
action(['RIGHT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
